{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230047067E49E920E1D0BBE03867"}"},"total":190},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7497188957571859225","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了十几章，目前来说还是非常不错的，先给个五星。给作者鼓鼓气，加加油，希望作者能够更新的快一点。有质量一点，真的挺喜欢看的，加油，作者。更新快一点哦。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745576192,"group_id":"7375551614792240153","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx6Nj7r0B5+mDoCpVlfaXtWZTPfNAaAzleWM/RXBFtHu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5c54ffc08eea4124ba7050a56c1bbf63~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790601&x-signature=QPTQ41YuTAzDwlbJ%2FO63mhPQXTA%3D","user_id":"1084580087467280","user_name":"媚洲岛的箫奕辰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1084580087467280","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7375551614792240153","book_info":{"abstract":"（美食+下饭+奶爸+都市日常+温馨搞笑+系统+无女主）
苏晨绑定美食系统，带着女儿每周随机摆摊。
健身馆外卖凉面，教练带着学员们纷纷馋哭，表示减肥怎么这么难！
医院门口卖爆辣小龙虾，有“痔”病人们忍着剧痛也要再吃一口！
长江边卖柠檬鸡爪，竟有六十岁大爷跨江而来，只为能够及时买到！
珍馐美味，数千年美食底蕴展现，每完成一次摆摊任务，便可获得神秘奖励。
满级维修，太极拳精通，多国语言精通......
随着时间的推移，苏晨赫然发现，自己貌似全知全能了！
不过他最喜欢的，还是被世人尊称为——全能厨神！
而当他的身份逐渐被曝光之后，那些不断寻找他的顾客们却是一拥而上：“老板，我们找你找的好苦啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a777eca279ae49317ee29eb1de816631","author":"爱吃肉片","author_id":"","book_id":"7375551614792240153","book_name":"美食：随机摆摊，全球食客馋哭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8123人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7375551655669924377","read_count":"8123","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1204248"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"607","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,奶爸,美食,无女主,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/57852c4fed7450fe9a237cd90f9dec2c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382026&x-signature=58WeZqCmLcKzkl1MRMC%2FEH85I68%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4406490898118638","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230047067E49E920E1D0BBE03867"}"},"re
